creator: ale_sagra@hotmail.com
text:
Created attachment 233532
oci-cli and py-oci update

I am opening this bugs report to update:
 * devel/py-oci to 2.65.0 version [1]
 * devel/oci-cli to 3.7.3 version

[1] https://github.com/oracle/oci-cli/releases/tag/v3.8.0
[2] https://github.com/oracle/oci-python-sdk/releases/tag/v2.65.0

The update should happen at the same time for both packages since oci-cli depends on a specific py-oci version:
https://github.com/oracle/oci-cli/blob/master/setup.py#L32

Link to the patch is https://patch-diff.githubusercontent.com/raw/freebsd/freebsd-ports/pull/125.patch
